title: campanula expansa subsp. crassa
intro: Campanula expansa subsp. crassa, also known as the broad-leaved bellflower, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Campanulaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits associated with Campanula expansa subsp. crassa include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to alleviate symptoms and promote overall well-being.
